title: [circt-reduce] Fix instance-stubber: ref/property
body:
The instance-stubber reduction was crashing when encountering ref types
(probes): and properties because it tried to create an InvalidValueOp for
them.  InvalidValueOp only accepts FIRRTLBaseType, and ref types are not
base types - they inherit directly from FIRRTLType.

This fix modifies the invalidateOutputs function to create a probe type
wire for probe ports.  The probe type wire is then defined with the probe
of another wire of the underlying type.

Property types create wires and are tied off with UnknownValueOp.

Fixes #9561.

AI-assisted-by: Augment (Claude Sonnet 4)
AI-assisted-by: Augment (Claude Sonnet 4.5)

#### Notes

These commits were generated with the help of LLMs. I have reviewed all changes.
